titleStmt.title: SII 6.696: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 696. (A.R. No. 245 of 1899). ON A ROUND PILLAR IN THE VERANDAH ROUND THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmaNmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣagetapuvarāyaragaṁḍa yavanarājya
sthāpanācārya śrī vīrapratāpa kṛṣṇadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagarāna siṁhāsanārūḍhuḍai pūrvadigvijayayātraku viccēśi
Uddagiri koṁḍavīḍu koṁḍapalli rājamahēṁdrāvaraṁ modalaina durgālu sādhiṁci siṁhyādriki viccēsi svasti śrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁbulu 1438 Agunēṭi dhātusaṁvatsara caitra ba 12 varāna sihyādrināthunni darśiṁci tama talli nāgā
dēvaṁmaṁgārikinni tama taṁḍri narasānāyuniṁgārikinni puṇyamugānu dēUniki samarpiṁcina kaṁṭhamāla 1 ki mutyālu 91 va
jramāṇikyāla kaḍiyālajōḍu 1 śaṁkhacakrālapadakaṁ 1 ki paiḍipaḷeṁ 1 ki tūṁkālu ga 44782 kānikamāḍalu ga 2100 tama dēUḷu
ciṁnādēvammaṁgāri cātanu samarpiṁcina padakaṁ 1 varahālu ga 500 tirumaladēvammaṁgāri cātanu samarpiṁcina padakaṁ 1 varahālu
ga 500 Iṁttavaṭṭu samarpiṁcina dharmmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 6.696 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
